name: Nille Elf-Daughter
bio:
Physical Appearance: Female vampire wearing light armor. Also carries a spare set of lower-class clothing. Displays the physical traits associated with vampirism.

Race: [Unknown; identifiable only through recovered notes]

Personality Keywords: devoted, corrupted

Role: Vampire and former worshipper of Azura; member of the Afflicted Brethren in Gutted Mine.

Home Location Information: Resides within Gutted Mine alongside the other members of the Afflicted Brethren.

Equipment and Abilities: Equipped with light armor and a one-handed blade. Capable of casting advanced Illusion magic consistent with bardic training, favoring deception and concealment over brute force.

Personality – Afflicted Worshipper: Nille Elf-Daughter was once a follower of Azura and became afflicted with vampirism after taking part in the slaying of a powerful vampire named Dratik. She remains within Gutted Mine with the other Afflicted Brethren, bound together by their shared origin and condition. One of the group carries a worn, faded note that records the identities of the Brethren.

Fate: Nille Elf-Daughter is one of the Afflicted Brethren whom Azura seeks to have released from their curse during her intervention at Gutted Mine.
author: Bethesda
